item.title: 美国两大通胀指标呈现不同态势
item.description: 关键价格指标的分歧可能足以抑制市场对美联储降息的押注。【原文：The diversion in key price measures may be enough to dampen bets on a Fed cut.】

item.title: Meta深耕复杂的芯片制造领域
item.description: 公司希望内部努力能在人工智能竞赛中占据优势【原文：Company hopes in-house effort gives it an advantage in the AI race】

item.title: 优步推出高端专车服务，积极争取商务用户
item.description: 优步科技公司推出针对企业及高管旅客的专车服务，旨在巩固其价值100亿美元的高端业务板块。与此同时，竞争对手Lyft公司也在加速进军高端出行市场。【原文：Uber Technologies Inc. is launching a new chauffeur ride option targeting corporate and executive travelers, bolstering its $10 billion premium segment in a market where rival Lyft Inc. is also pushing further into high-end offerings.】

item.title: 英伟达校友加入专注人工智能的投资公司Era
item.description: 英伟达公司两名高管已离职，加入一家新兴金融公司。该公司正代表全球部分最富有的家族，悄然投资人工智能领域。【原文：Two executives from Nvidia Corp. have left the chipmaker to work at a young finance firm that’s quietly investing in artificial intelligence on behalf of some of the world’s richest families.】

item.title: 印度因战时天然气短缺影响工厂运转，向中国寻求尿素援助
item.description: 印度已要求中国允许其出售部分尿素货物，因中东战争导致该国天然气供应受限，威胁到这个农业大国的化肥生产。【原文：India has asked China to allow the sale of some urea cargoes as the war in the Middle East curtails the nation’s gas supplies, threatening fertilizer production in the agricultural powerhouse.】

item.title: 私募股权公司Charlesbank将收购加拿大Overbay Capital的股权
item.description: 知情人士透露，中型市场收购机构Charlesbank Capital Partners LLC已同意收购Overbay Capital Partners Inc.的部分股权，该交易对这家加拿大二级市场公司的估值为2亿加元（约合1.47亿美元）。【原文：Middle-market buyout shop Charlesbank Capital Partners LLC agreed to buy a stake in Overbay Capital Partners Inc. in a deal that values the Canadian secondaries firm at C$200 million ($147 million), according to people with knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 德意志银行称商业地产仍是主要风险
item.description: 德意志银行表示，其在美国商业房地产领域的风险敞口仍是"关键风险"，可能迫使其增加信贷损失准备金。该资产类别正面临再融资困境，且价格稳定前景仍不明朗，尤其在美国市场。【原文：Deutsche Bank AG said its exposure to US commercial real estate remains a “key risk” that could force it to raise provisions for credit losses, as the asset class struggles with refinancings and a stabilization of prices remains uncertain, particularly in the US.】

item.title: 波斯湾航班再度受阻，导弹袭击持续不断
item.description: 周四，中东地区航班运行受阻，伊朗邻国遭受无人机袭击造成破坏，导致全球最大交通枢纽之一的旅客运输紧凑协调计划进一步瓦解。【原文：Flights across the Middle East were disrupted Thursday as drone attacks inflicted damage on Iran’s neighbors, further unraveling a tightly coordinated schedule for moving passengers through some of the world’s biggest travel hubs.】

item.title: 乌克兰袭击俄罗斯南部重要输油管道枢纽
item.description: 乌克兰袭击了俄罗斯南部克拉斯诺达尔边疆区境内一条原油出口管道网络的重要枢纽。【原文：Ukraine hit an important hub for Russia’s network of crude-export pipelines in the southern Krasnodar region.】

item.title: 俄罗斯将大幅削减开支，尽管伊朗战争推高油价
item.description: 俄罗斯计划缩减今年的预算支出，以遏制不断扩大的财政赤字并避免增加借贷，尽管油价飙升带来了财政收入增长。【原文：Russia plans to scale back this year’s budget spending to rein in a widening deficit and avoid an increase in borrowing, even as surging oil prices boost revenue.】

item.title: 印度通胀加速，油价料将进一步飙升
item.description: 印度通胀率在2月份加速上升，当时中东冲突尚未爆发，能源供应中断推高油气价格，给政策制定者带来压力。【原文：India’s inflation accelerated in February before the conflict in the Middle East, putting pressure on policymakers as disruption to energy supplies push up prices of oil and gas.】

item.title: 欧盟反垄断机构正对大型科技公司的"全部"人工智能业务展开审查
item.description: 欧盟反垄断事务负责人表示，科技巨头在人工智能技术全产业链上的影响力正受到审查，以评估其是否可能扭曲市场竞争。【原文：Big Tech’s power across the full chain of AI technologies is under scrutiny for possible competition distortions, according to the European Union’s antitrust chief.】

item.title: 卡塔尔铝厂因天然气供应保障得以避免全面停产
item.description: 卡塔尔铝业公司不再计划完全关闭其在该国的冶炼厂，在确认该工厂将继续从供应商处获得天然气供应后，现将维持约60%的产能运行。【原文：Qatar Aluminum Ltd. no longer plans to fully shut down its smelter in the country, and will now maintain operations at about 60% of capacity following confirmation that the plant will continue to receive gas from its supplier.】

item.title: 人工智能客服初创公司Wonderful AI完成1.5亿美元融资
item.description: 以色列初创企业Wonderful已完成1.5亿美元融资，这笔资金将加速其部署人工智能驱动的客户支持代理。【原文：Israeli startup Wonderful has raised $150 million in funding that will accelerate its deployment of artificial intelligence-powered customer support agents.】

item.title: 印度证券交易所NSE为25亿美元IPO选定银行家和律师团队
item.description: 印度国家证券交易所有限公司在声明中表示，已为其备受期待的首次公开募股选定20家承销商。【原文：National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. has selected 20 bankers for its long-awaited initial public offering, the exchange said in a statement.】

item.title: 新兴市场货币期权预示短期内将面临更多压力
item.description: 根据一项关键期权定价指标显示，随着伊朗战争升级，交易员们正为未来一个月新兴市场货币进一步走弱做好准备。【原文：Traders are bracing for more weakness in emerging-market currencies over the coming month as the Iran war escalates, according to a key options pricing measure.】

item.title: 中东航运危机加剧，更多油轮在海湾地区遇袭
item.description: 伊朗在波斯湾对航运发起新一轮袭击，导致原油价格短暂回升至每桶100美元以上，加剧了全球能源监管机构所称的史上最大规模石油市场扰乱。【原文：Iran launched a fresh wave of attacks on shipping in the Persian Gulf, briefly pushing crude back above $100 a barrel and intensifying what the world’s energy watchdog called the biggest oil market disruption in history.】

item.title: 债券交易员正将全球更大的财政赤字纳入定价考量
item.description:
美国30年期国债收益率正攀升至4.9%，这是全球借贷成本上升趋势的一部分。

【原文：

The yield on the 30-year US Treasury bond is climbing toward 4.9%, part of a global move higher in borrowing costs.

】

item.title: 伊朗战争导致运力紧张，欧洲集装箱即期运价飙升
item.description: 过去一周，从中国向欧洲运输集装箱货物的成本大幅攀升。中东战事扰乱了全球最繁忙的航运路线之一，导致运输时间延长。【原文：The cost to ship goods in containers to Europe from China jumped over the past week as the war in the Mideast disrupts one of the world’s busiest shipping routes and lengthens delivery times.】

item.title: 德意志银行披露300亿美元私募信贷风险敞口
item.description: 德意志银行披露其在私募信贷领域的风险敞口达260亿欧元（约合300亿美元）。该资产类别正面临资金赎回潮、承销标准审查以及人工智能对软件制造商等借款人的影响等多重挑战。【原文：Deutsche Bank AG flagged a €26 billion ($30 billion) exposure to private credit, an asset class that’s grappling with fund redemptions, scrutiny of underwriting standards and the impact of AI on some borrowers such as software makers.】

item.title: 秘鲁天然气泄漏事件揭示：不稳定终究是关键因素
item.description: 秘鲁一条天然气管道持续泄漏，突然暴露出该国长期政治动荡的代价——这种现象往往被投资者所忽视。【原文：A prolonged natural gas pipeline leak in Peru is suddenly laying bare the costs of its chronic political instability, a phenomenon that’s often shrugged off by investors.】

item.title: 战争开支因赤字担忧拖累长期政府债券
item.description: 投资者对伊朗战争潜在成本日益担忧，长期政府债券价格因此走低，市场忧虑这场冲突将加剧预算赤字压力。【原文：Investors are growing uneasy about the potential cost of the Iran war, sending long-term government bonds lower amid concerns over how the conflict will add to pressures on budget deficits.】

item.title: 特斯拉中国2月交付量逆势反弹
item.description: 特斯拉公司2月份在中国的销量从去年低位回升，这家电动汽车制造商成功应对了春节九天假期带来的销售停滞以及补贴逐步退出的挑战。【原文：Tesla Inc.’s China sales recovered in February from a low base last year, as the electric-vehicle maker weathered challenges from a nine-day Lunar New Year lull and gradual phase out of subsidies.】

item.title: 俄罗斯精英阶层押注基金会为继承人锁定数十亿资产
item.description: 俄罗斯富豪正越来越多地在本国设立私人基金会，以保护并传承其财富，借此契机响应国家吸引海外资金回流的政策。【原文：Wealthy Russians are increasingly setting up private foundations at home to protect and pass on their fortunes, taking advantage of the country’s drive to bring back money stashed overseas.】

item.title: 国际能源署称伊朗战争正引发史上最大规模石油市场动荡
item.description: 国际能源署表示，伊朗战争正引发石油市场前所未有的动荡，影响全球7.5%的石油供应，出口受冲击的范围更为广泛。【原文：The Iran war is causing unprecedented turmoil in oil markets, hitting 7.5% of global supply and an even bigger swath of exports, the International Energy Agency said.】

item.title: 俄罗斯石油出口收入跌至乌克兰战争以来最低水平
item.description: 国际能源署表示，由于西方制裁限制了俄罗斯石油销售并迫使其加大价格折扣力度，加上基辅方面持续对石油基础设施发动袭击，俄罗斯2月份石油出口收入降至入侵乌克兰以来的最低水平。【原文：Russia’s oil-export revenue shrank in February to the lowest since its invasion of Ukraine after Western sanctions curbed sales and forced deeper price discounts, while Kyiv continued attacks on oil infrastructure, the International Energy Agency said.】

item.title: 得益于美国资金注入，欧洲融资规模创历史新高
item.description: 去年夏天，扬·奥伯豪泽为其柏林软件初创公司n8n进行的融资轮引发了一场竞购战。这位创始人及其团队共收到14份投资意向书，其中多数来自美国投资者。【原文：Jan Oberhauser’s funding round for his Berlin-based software startup n8n led to a bidding war last summer. The founder and his team received 14 offers, or term sheets. Most were from American investors.】

item.title: 印度正与伊朗进行谈判，以确保油轮安全通行
item.description: 据知情人士透露，印度正与伊朗进行磋商，以确保20多艘油轮安全通过霍尔木兹海峡。【原文：India is in talks with Iran to secure the safe passage of more than 20 tankers through the Strait of Hormuz, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 摩根大通、瑞银终止与卷入香港调查的对冲基金合作
item.description: 据知情人士透露，摩根大通公司和瑞银集团早在香港当局就涉嫌内幕交易展开调查并公开前，就已切断了与该投资公司的主经纪业务关系。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. and UBS Group AG cut prime brokerage ties with the investment firm that was raided by authorities during a probe into alleged insider dealing in Hong Kong well before the investigation was made public, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 印度计划设立110亿美元新基金支持本土芯片制造
item.description: 印度计划推出一项规模超过1万亿卢比（约合108亿美元）的基金，旨在加强国内芯片制造能力，推进其成为全球制造业中心的雄心勃勃的计划。【原文：India plans to unveil a more than 1 trillion rupee ($10.8 billion) fund aimed at bolstering domestic chipmaking, advancing its ambitious bid to become a global manufacturing hub.】
